name: UnPlugged
short_description: Embark on an adventure with a friend in UnPlugged. Work together with a friend in a challenging Local Co-Op as two robots who work their way through challenging puzzles and mazes in an epic adventure.
detailed_description:
PLAY ON STEAM USING THE REMOTE PLAY TOGETHER FEATURE


Embark on an adventure with a friend in UnPlugged. Work together with a friend in a challenging Local Co-Op as two robots who work their way through challenging puzzles and mazes in an epic adventure.

STAY PLUGGED


Both robots need a power source to operate. Stay Plugged or have a backup power source and make sure that your friend also has power to operate

EXPERIENCE A CHALLENGING GAMEPLAY


Make your way through puzzles and dangerous scenarios as you and your companion synergize to reach your destination using a variety of attachments and perfect cooperation.

WORK TOGETHER


Use teamwork to solve puzzles, overcome obstacles and find power sources for yourself and your companion.

Test you friendship as you adventure through the sci-fi Lab together with a friend. Unlock and master new attachments. Help each other out of dangerous situations, all while staying plugged in to a power source and managing your electric reserves!


Note:
THIS PRODUCT IS CO-OP ONLY. Play the entire experience with your friends using Steam's Remote Play Together feature.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
